title: Might & Magic X - Legacy
notes: Launches uPlay login but unable to login to account "A ubisoft service currently unavailable"

UPlay must be manually updated to connect to server. I did this by downloading the installer from their website and copying then renaming the UPlayInstaller and game .exe files to trick steam into running it for me.
================================================================
Must use WineD3d11 or else the game will hang shortly after launch.
================================================================
Played at near maxed out settings at 1440p. Was able to go through and clear out the first dungeon and leave town with no performance drops or crashes. Saving and loading works fine.
